# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Core Infrastructure Components Stack

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  SubnetPublicA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  GatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  RouteTablePublicA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  RoutePublicToInternet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: GatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePublicA
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetAssociationPublicA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetPublicA
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePublicA

  SecurityGroupWebServer:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Web Server Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: your-key-pair
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroupWebServer
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetPublicA

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupName: MyDBSubnetGroup
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: RDS Database Subnet Group
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref SubnetPublicA

  RDSDatabase:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: mydbinstance
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: admin
      MasterUserPassword: yourpassword
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: your-unique-bucket-name

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingv2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: MyLoadBalancer
      Subnets:
        - !Ref SubnetPublicA
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SecurityGroupWebServer
      Scheme: internet-facing
      Type: application

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingv2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: MyTargetGroup
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      HealthCheckPath: /
      Targets:
        - Id: !Ref EC2Instance

  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingv2::Listener
    Properties:
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref LoadBalancer
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: The ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC

  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: The ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance

  RDSDatabaseEndpoint:
    Description: The endpoint address for the RDS database
    Value: !GetAtt RDSDatabase.Endpoint.Address

  S3BucketName:
    Description: The name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket

  LoadBalancerDNSName:
    Description: The DNS name of the Load Balancer
    Value: !GetAtt LoadBalancer.DNSName
